title: Study Cards Collection Contract
description: Shared contract for collection JSON files under /collections. This documents the common file shape used by the generic collection loader and validators. Metadata keys starting with '_' are treated as extension keys and are intentionally allowed.

name.description: Display name for the collection as shown in the UI.

description.description: Short summary of what the collection contains and how it should be interpreted.

version.description: Collection content/schema revision number maintained by the collection author.

category.description: Top-level category or domain used for grouping collections.

source.description: Optional provenance note describing where the data came from.

entry_key.description: Primary field key used to uniquely identify entries within the collection.

schema.description: Inline collection field schema describing the entry object shape used by collection tooling.

schemaTypes.description: Optional nested object type definitions used by collections with structured schema fields.

relatedCollections.description: Optional relation definitions used to attach data from other collections by matching keys or nested references.

fields.description: Legacy alias for schema-like field definitions. Prefer metadata.schema for new collections.

metadata.description: Shared metadata block that defines collection identity, entry keying, field schema, and optional relation/nested-type helpers.

key.description: Machine-readable field id used by entry objects and UI code. This should match the property name on each entry.

label.description: Primary human-readable label for the field in the UI.

jp_label.description: Optional Japanese label for bilingual displays.

description.description: Optional field-level help text explaining semantics, usage, or normalization rules.

type.description: Logical field type used by the collection tooling. This is the custom collection-schema type, not a full JSON Schema type.

required.description: Optional hint that the field is expected to be present for normal authoring or import flows.

values.description: Allowed value map for enum-like fields. This is intended for type='enum' or 'enum[]' fields and maps each stored value to a human-readable explanation.

name.description: Stable relation name used as the key under entry.relatedCollections.

path.description: Relative path from /collections to the related collection file.

this_key.description: Path expression on the current collection entry used as the local lookup key.

foreign_key.description: Path expression on the related collection entry used to find references back to the current collection.

fields.description: Optional list of related-entry fields that are especially useful to surface in the UI.

relatedCollection.description: Definition for a related collection that can be joined onto entries at runtime.

key.description: Field key to expose from the related collection entry.

label.description: Optional UI label for the related field.

relatedCollectionField.description: Field descriptor for a related collection preview.
